Ajay Kumar.subject: React Developer - Ahmedabad Opportunity
Ajay Kumar.body:
Hi,

I noticed Vivansh Infotech is expanding its development team in Ahmedabad, and I was very interested. I have 2.6 years of experience building user interfaces with React.js, and I'm proficient in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS – all core to your requirements. I've focused on creating responsive and performant front-end components, and I'm eager to contribute to a growing team. My resume is attached for your review, and I’d be keen to discuss how my skills could benefit Vivansh Infotech.

Current CTC: 6 LPA | Expected CTC: 12-15 LPA

Regards,
Ajay Kumar
https://ajayluhach.in/
linkedin.com/in/ajayluhach7
github.com/AjayLuhach

Sonam.subject: React Developer - Ahmedabad Opportunity
Sonam.body:
Hi,

I noticed Vivansh Infotech is expanding its development team in Ahmedabad, which is great to see. As a Full Stack MERN developer with 2.2 years of experience, I'm proficient in React.js, and have a strong foundation in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS – all core to your requirements. I’ve built several projects utilizing these technologies, focusing on creating responsive and user-friendly interfaces. I'm particularly interested in contributing to a growing team. My resume is attached for your review, and I’d be keen to discuss how my skills could benefit Vivansh Infotech.

Sonam
